character.name: Langrisser II SNES 16-bit tactical
character.prompt:
Langrisser II SNES 16-bit tactical RPG style chibi female battle mage,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions with slightly elongated body,
large head with sharp anime eyes and detailed expression, crisp 90s anime sprite shading,
long flowing silver hair past shoulders with side bangs, head bare,
wearing layered white and deep blue robe with bright red sash and ornate gold trim,
polished silver pauldrons with engraved emblems,
deep navy cape with crimson lining flowing behind to mid-calf,
heavy hood fabric folded at upper back behind neck, never on head,
ornate wooden staff with brilliant sapphire crystal orb in right hand,
brown leather belt with brass buckle and hanging pouches,
young woman early 20s, noble heroic stance,
classic 16-bit tactical RPG pixel art by Satoshi Urushihara aesthetic,
saturated rich palette with strong contrast, crisp hand-painted shading,
defined anime-style face, sharp tactical silhouette
